subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #009 Baha’u’llah
subcodes.first_line: Baha'u'llah appeared at a time when Persia was plunged in the darkest ignorance
subcodes.first_line_orig: اما جمال مبارک در زمانیکه ممالک ایران در چنین ظلمت و نادانی مستغرق
subcodes.subjects: @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @past, present and future of Iran, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @lack of formal education of the Manifestation of God, @growth of the Cause, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals
